ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Continued To Oct-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Neham for Yu Yun Tien.
Amanda Ebey for Lily Tien.

Ms. Ebey stated that the case settled and that her Client has complied with the terms. Mr. Neham stated that he intends to file a dismissal, but he wants to clear up the issue with title. Status of mediation is continued to October 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference On The Underlying Petition
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Konstantine Demiris for Yu Yun Tien (Beneficiary).
Amanda Ebey for Lily Tien (Trustee).

Ms. Ebey stated that they agreed to mediation, that they have chosen a Mediator and that they have to select a date. Mr. Demiris stated that he filed a petition for removal with a hearing date of November 19, 2018. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 14, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 19, 2018. The Parties are to return on September 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to report on status of mediation. The trial date of November 9, 2018 is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Lily Tien (respondent). Konstantine Demeris for Yu Yun Tien (petitioner).

The Court adpopted the tenative ruling as follows: Petitioner's Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement is denied. Per the case law, there was no enforceable settlement agreement stated at the August 7, 2017 hearing for the purposes of CCP 664.6, as the individual parties did not personally state their acceptance of all material terms of the settlement agreement as the terms were presented to the Court on August 7, 2017, or December 13, 2017. There is no single, signed written agreement under which to enforce an agreement under 664.6, either. The Court has no authority under the cited case law or CCP 664.6 to create a settlement agreement. The Court can determine issues of fact relevant to determining whether a settlement has been breached, but can only make a determination regarding enforcement under CCP 664.6 when there has been a meeting of the minds on each material settlement term. Order for the same signed in open court.

The Court referred this matter to pro bono mediation (order for the same signed in open court). Mediation must be completed no later than August 06, 2018. Counsel must notify the assigned Probate Examiner of the status of the mediation by August 08, 2018. A status conference on the underlying petition is herby ser for August 13, 2018 at 9:00a.m., in Dept. 204. A pretrial conference is set for Wednesday, October 31, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties are to submit trial briefs, motion in limine, witness lists and exhibit lists. An evidentiary hearing is set for November 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge John K. Stewart, Clerk: N. Wong, Deputy: Seale. Not Reported.

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlie Yu for Yu Yun Tien (Petitioner).
Amanda Ebey for Lily Tien.

Ms. Ebey stated that they settled the case out in the hallway. Mr. Yu stated that they will execute a settlement, do distribution in transfer and file a dismissal. The status conference and the trial on the Petition to Compel Distribution to Beneficiaries set for January 5, 2018 are off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Jan-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlie Yu for and with Yu Yun Tien.
Amanda Ebey for Lily Tien Respondent.

My Yu stated that they entered into a settlement as to all of the issues expect for distribution of the net rental income, spoke of fees being high and requested an accounting of the rents. Ms. Ebey requested a trial date, stated that it would be no longer than one half day and spoke of doing some discovery. Ms. Ebey also stated that there is a lis pendens on the property, that her Client's hands are tied, that her Client needs to sell the property and that they can not provide an amount of funds left until they do the taxes. The Petition to Compel Distribution to Beneficiaries is continued to January 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for trial. The Parties are to confer and narrow down the issue. Ms. Ebey to file an accounting by close of business December 11, 2017. A status conference is set for December 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Sep-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charlie Yu for petitioner Yu Yun Tien; Amanda Ebey for Willie Tien.

Mr. Yu reported that the parties had reached an agreement on a plan for distribution. Ms. Ebey confirmed this, stating that the trustee will distribute Unit #2 to the petitioner, and also make an equalizing payment of $8,333.33 to the petitioner. The trustee will distribute net rental income to the date of distribution. Petitioner waives an accounting. The transfer is to be made within 30 days. Mr. Yu agreed, and stated he would be filing a dismissal of the petiton upon the transfer being made. The matter was continued to September 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status hearing on the dismissal.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not reported)

Petition To Compel Distribution To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Jul-17-2017 Continued To Aug-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charlie Yu for and with Yu Yun Tien (Petitioner).
Amanda Ebey for and with Lily Tien.

Ms. Ebey requested a three to four week continuance stating that they have talked about mediation, that they seem to be close to resolving issues, that she thinks they can work it out on their own and that she does not think an accounting is needed. The Petition to Compel Distribution to Beneficiaries is continued to August 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
